expectations.evidence: Lists 9 locations for Sound Bath modality: AdminPanel.tsx, DashboardProfile.tsx, Directory.tsx, IslandHome.tsx, 11_gm_classify.py, 24_normalize_modalities.py, seed_taxonomy.sql, seed_aliases.sql, and canonical-modalities.md reference (exceeds 5 required).
Lists 8 locations for coworking_space: database.ts (TypeScript type), adapters.ts, DashboardCenters.tsx, AdminPanel.tsx (4 separate SelectItem groups), and migration file (exceeds 4 required).
Section 'Part 1' specifically notes 'taxonomy_terms table doesn't have Sound Bath term' and mentions 'seed_taxonomy.sql' migration as needing Sound Bath term insertion for the new search system.

Section 'Critical Issues C4' explicitly mentions 'CHECK constraint on centers.center_type column doesn't include the value' and 'Critical Issues C2' notes database will reject saves. Migration example provided showing ALTER TABLE constraint update.

Report recognizes 'Sound Healing' already exists (documented in seed_taxonomy.sql) and notes that 'Sound Bath' may be a separate modality or synonym. Critical Finding states 'Sound Bath exists in production data (found in actual listing names)' but is missing from UI lists.
